title: Black Bean Sauce
description:
Black bean sauce is an essential ingredient in the Cantonese dish  “Beef in Black bean sauce”. 

It adds a unique flavour to stir fry beef,  pork casserole and steamed fish.
summary: A traditional Cantonese sauce that is versatile enough to use with beef, pork and fish.
ingredients: Water, black beans, sugar, vegetable oil, garlic, ginger, corn starch, salt, spices

title: Chinese Black Pepper Sauce
description:
Authentic black pepper sauce originating from Cantonese cuisine, made popular by Chinese restaurants around the world. 

Can be used with all meats and firm white fish.  

Now gluten free.
summary: Authentic Cantonese flavour for all meat and fish dishes.
ingredients: Water, sugar, refined salt, black pepper, rice wine, garlic, onion, tomato paste, corn starch 1422, soy bean, citric acid, caramel colour (150a) flavour enhancer (621), spices

title: Cleaver and wooden chopping board
description:
The Chang's Cleaver is a brilliantly sharp handmade utility chopper, made from Damascus steel.

The unique pattern on the blade is made from 67 layers of high carbon stainless steel forged together through 50 steps of manufacturing. The chopper is well balanced for handling and stays sharp for longer. 

The chopping board is made from best hardwood from Taiwan, known for its dense fibre structure.

Packed in a gift box, and priced at only $299.00.
summary: This brilliantly sharp Chang's Cleaver, made from Damascus steel, and accompanying Chang's wooden chopping board can by yours for only $299.00

title: Crispy Noodle Salad Dressing
description: A ready-made dressing to add to your favourite Asian salad.
summary: The perfect dressing for your fried noodle salad. Gluten Free. No artificial colours or preservatives.
ingredients: Water, Sugar, Refined Salt, Naturally Brewed Soy Sauce (Soya Bean, Water, Salt, Rice Extract), Sesame Oil, Vinegar, Vegetable Gum (415).

title: Crunchy Fried Noodles
description:
Authentic Asian cooking, Chang’s Crunchy Noodles can be eaten straight out the packet. 

Alternatively they can be added to soups, stews, casseroles or salads.
Great with dips or in party snack mixes, Chang’s Crunchy Noodles are really versatile and add crunch to any dish.
summary:
Ready to eat flat, short crunchy fried noodles made with wheat flour and fried in cottonseed oil.
So good you can eat them out of the packet!
ingredients: Wheat flour, Cottonseed oil, Salt, Raising Agents (450, 500, 501), Antioxidants (300, 307b), Colour (160b)

title: Delicious Mongolian Style Stir Fry Sauce
description: Chang's range of sauces make cooking a delicious, quick dinner easy for everyone. This Mongolian style sauce is a great addition to stir fries.
summary: Chang's range of sauces make cooking a delicious, quick dinner easy for everyone. This Mongolian style sauce is a great addition to stir fries.
ingredients: Water, Soya Beans, Cooking Wine, Peanut, Garlic, Sugar, Salt, Sesame Oil, Spices.

title: Egg Noodles
description:
Chang’s Egg Noodles are made using egg whites only, which imparts an extra silky texture.

Versatile in a stir-fry, soups and even salads, Chang’s noodles carry the Heart Foundation Tick of approval for contributing to a balanced diet. 
Each pack of noodles contains three portions.
summary: Healthy, versatile egg noodles for use in a stir-fry, soups and salads.
ingredients: Wheat flour, egg white, wheat gluten, water, natural colouring 160(b) Product of Taiwan

title: Gluten Free Fried Noodles
description:
Chang’s introduces its Gluten Free Fried Noodle to its range so now people following a gluten-free diet can enjoy our famous Oriental Fried Noodle Salad or Chocolate Spiders.

Sold in a convenient 100g packet.
summary:
Ready to eat short, thin, crunchy fried noodles made with rice flour and fried in cottonseed oil.
Gluten-free fried noodles for salads and spiders!
ingredients: Rice flour, Cottonseed Oil, Salt, Raising Agents (450, 500), Antioxidants (300, 307b)

title: Gluten Free Tamari Light Soy Sauce
description:
Soy Sauce can be used as a flavouring marinade, table sauce or dipping sauce. Marinade any meat, poultry, vegetables and seafood to enhance your favourite dishes.

“Light” means the colour is lighter.
summary: Soy Sauce can be used as a flavouring marinade, table sauce or dipping sauce. Marinade any meat, poultry, vegetables and seafood to enhance your favourite dishes.
ingredients: Soya Beans (Soy), Water, Sea Salt.
allergen:
Gluten Free, Wheat Free, MSG FREE

Contains: Soybeans.
May Contain: Peanuts

title: Hokkien Noodles
description:
Delicious Shelf Fresh Noodles Hokkien Style sealed in four convenient packets.

Ready to use, just heat in microwave or add near the end of cooking your favourite stir-fry.
summary: Ready to use Hokkien noodles in convenient packets.
ingredients: Wheat flour,Water,Wheat gluten,salt,Food acid(lactic),Thickener(401),Natural Colours 100,160(a).

title: Japanese Ponzu Sauce
description:
A sweet tangy citrus based soy sauce commonly used in Japanese cooking, its fresh uplifting flavour enhances grilled meat or seafood.

Chang’s Ponzu Sauce is perfect as a salad dressing on its own or with a little oil or mirin. 
Also great with sushi.
summary: A sweet and tangy citrus based soy sauce.
ingredients: Citron juice, sugar, water, natural brewed soy sauce (soy bean, water, salt, wheat flour), rice vinegar, rice white wine, corn starch, spices

title: Japanese Teriyaki Sauce
description:
Teriyaki Sauce can be used as a marinade, table sauce and in stir fries for your meats, poultry, vegetables and seafood to enhance your favourite dishes.

Our Japanese Teriyaki Sauce brings both taste and lustre to your grill, BBQ or pan fry.
summary:
Teriyaki Sauce can be used as a marinade, table sauce and in stir fries for your meats, poultry, vegetables and seafood to enhance your favourite dishes.

Our Japanese Teriyaki Sauce brings both taste and lustre to your grill, BBQ or pan fry.
ingredients: Water, Naturally Brewed Soy Sauce (Water, Soya Bean Extract, Wheat Extract, Salt), Brown sugar, Corn Syrup, Vinegar, Wine, Corn starch (1422), Yeast extract, Onion, Spices
allergen:
Gluten Free.  No artificial colouring or preservatives.

Contains: Soybeans, Wheat 
May Contain: Peanuts

title: Japanese Tonkatsu Sauce
description: Tasty favourite in Japan for fried pork cutlets, but equally delicious with potato wedges and chicken nuggets. Try it with your favourite bbq meats and sausages.
summary: Dipping sauce. See label for recipes. Try with your favourite BBQ meats and sausages.
ingredients: Water, Sugar, Corn syrup, Vinegar, Apple Juice, Refined Salt, Tomato, Carrot,  Corn starch (1422), Caramel Colour (150a). Onion, Garlic, Ginger,  Spices.

title: Japanese Yakitori Sauce
description: Yakitori is a popular Japanese finger-food, made with tender pieces of chicken threaded on wooden skewers and marinated with Obento Yakitori Sauce, then barbequed over an open flame.
summary: Yakitori is a popular Japanese finger-food, made with tender pieces of chicken threaded on wooden skewers and marinated with Obento Yakitori Sauce, then barbequed over an open flame.
ingredients: Water, Naturally Brewed Soy Sauce (Soya Bean, Rice, Salt), Sugar, Rice Wine, Mirin, Garlic, Corn Starch (1422), Ginger, Flavour Enhancer (621), Vinegar, Spices, Flavour Enhancer (627, 631).

title: Kecap Manis Sweet Soy Sauce
description: A tasty sweet soy sauce to add to meals or for dipping.
summary: Naturally brewed...ideal for a bbq marinade
ingredients: Water, Sugar, Natural Brewed Soy Sauce, Salt, Caramel, Vinegar, Wine, Spices.

title: Long Life Noodles
description:
Chang’s Long Life Noodles are made the traditional way, steamed and then dried with hot air.

They require minimal cooking, are packed in four individual portions and are ideal for a stir-fry, soup and salads. These noodles contain no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives and are 98% fat free!
summary: Traditional noodles perfect for a stir-fry, soup or salad.
ingredients: Wheat flour, water, salt Product of China

title: Master Stock
description:
Chang’s has taken the hard work out of creating an authentic master stock with the introduction of Chang’s Master Stock.

The shaoxing rice wine, star anise, ginger and cassia are all in the bottle, blended perfectly for you to make restaurant-quality food at home.
summary: Authentic master stock with none of the hard work.
ingredients: Water, shaoxing wine, naturally brewed soy sauce, (soya bean, water, salt, wheat flour), brown sugar, garlic, ginger, vinegar, sorghum liqueur, star anise, cinnamon, fennel

title: Organic Ramen Noodles
description: Ramen is a Japanese name for traditional Chinese-style noodles (stretched noodles). It is often used in stir-fries and soups.
summary: Ramen is a Japanese name for traditional Chinese-style noodles (stretched noodles). It is often used in stir-fries and soups.
ingredients: Organic Wheat Flour; Organic  Buckwheat  Flour, Salt

title: Organic Soba Noodles
description:
Chang’s Organic Soba Noodles are thin traditional Japanese-style noodles made with a mixture of wheat and buckwheat.

With a similar size and shape to Italian spaghetti, our Organic Soba Noodles are suitable for many pasta dishes.
summary:
Chang’s Organic Soba Noodles are thin traditional Japanese-style noodles made with a mixture of wheat and buckwheat.

With a similar size and shape to Italian spaghetti, our Organic Soba Noodles are suitable for many pasta dishes.
ingredients: Organic Wheat Flour; Organic Buckwheat Flour, Salt

title: Original Chinese Sate Sauce
description: This is the original sate sauce made in the Chiuchow area in southern China.  Later passed to Malaysia and Singapore by Chinese migrants.
summary: This is the original sate sauce made in the Chiuchow area in southern China.  Later passed to Malaysia and Singapore by Chinese migrants.
ingredients: Water, Soya Bean Oil, Chilli, Peanuts, Sugar, Naturally Brewed Soy Sauce (Soya Bean, Rice, Salt), Garlic, Natural Fermented Soya Beans, Caramel Colour 150a, Dried Shrimp, Refined Salt, Curry Powder, Rice Wine, Flavour Enhancer 621, Corn Starch 1422, Shallot, Spices, Spices.

title: Original Fish Sauce
description:
A naturally brewed sauce made from fresh anchovies and salt, Fish Sauce is used extensively in Thai and Vietnamese cooking.

Fish Sauce adds a unique delicious savoury flavour to your soups, stews, stir-fries, curries, dressings and as a dipping sauce.
summary:
A naturally brewed sauce made from fresh anchovies and salt, Fish Sauce is used extensively in Thai and Vietnamese cooking.

Fish Sauce adds a unique delicious savoury flavour to your soups, stews, stir-fries, curries, dressings and as a dipping sauce.
ingredients: Anchovy Extract (Fish) (65%), Water, Salt, Sugar.

title: Original Fried Noodles
description:
Our famous Original Fried Noodles - use in salads and soups for that extra crunch!

Chang's Original Fried Noodles are cooked in cottonseed oil.
summary: Our famous original fried noodles! Ready to eat thin, short, straight crunchy fried noodles made with wheat flour and fried in cottonseed oil.
ingredients: Wheat flour, Cottonseed oil, Salt, Raising Agents (450,500,501), Antioxidants (300, 307b), Colour (160b)

title: Original Hoisin Sauce
description:
Skip boring tomato sauce and take Chang’s Hoisin Sauce to your BBQ or dinner table.

Hoisin in Chinese means “Delicious as Seafood, started as a dipping sauce for roast pork in Canton and was later used as a spread on lettuce for San Choi Bow.

Also is ideal as a marinade.
summary: Perfect for glazes, marinades, a stir-fry or simply as a dipping sauce.
ingredients: Water, Soy Beans, Modified Corn Starch (1422), Sugar, Vinegar, Garlic, Salt, Flavour Enhancer (621). No artificial colours or preservatives added.

title: Original Hot Chilli Sauce
description:
Who doesn't love a spicy chilli sauce? And a gluten-free one at that!

Chang's Original Hot Chilli Sauce is the most desirable of accompaniments, perfect for any occasion.

Dip in it, pour it on, add it to soups, spice up marinades, BBQ and seafood sauces or even salad dressings!

One of our favourite uses to create a mind-blowing grilled cheese and chilli sandwich. Divine.
summary: Who doesn't love a spicy chilli sauce? And a gluten-free one at that!
ingredients: Water, Chilli (27.2% ), Sugar, Garlic, Ginger, Salt, Corn Starch, Vinegar, Spices.

title: Original Oyster Sauce
description:
Chang’s Oyster Sauce is a traditional sauce widely used in Cantonese cooking.

Complex flavours make it suitable for stir-fried beef, pork or chicken as well as being very tasty as a dipping sauce for steamed fish.

Chang’s Oyster Sauce is gluten free.
summary: Traditional sauce particularly popular for use with a stir-fry.
ingredients: Water, oyster extract (36%), sugar, salt, thickener (1422), naturally brewed soy sauce (soy bean, water, salt, wheat extract), flavour enhancer (621), food acid (330), flavour enhancers (627, 631)

title: Savoury Black Bean Stir Fry Sauce
description: Black bean sauce is an essential ingredient in the Cantonese dish “Beef in Black bean sauce”.  It adds a unique flavour to stir-fry beef,  pork casserole and steamed fish.
summary: Black bean sauce is an essential ingredient in the Cantonese dish “Beef in Black bean sauce”.  It adds a unique flavour to stir-fry beef,  pork casserole and steamed fish.
ingredients: Water, Black Beans, Sugar, Vegetable Oil, Garlic, Ginger, Corn Starch, Salt, Spices.

title: Sesame Oil
description:
Chang’s Sesame Oil gives a delicate flavour to meats, chicken, vegetable and noodles.

Add towards the end of cooking for best results.

Available in the cooking oil aisle at your favourite supermarket and selected independent food stores.
summary:
Chang’s Sesame Oil gives a delicate flavour to meats, chicken, vegetable and noodles.

Add towards the end of cooking for best results.

Available in the cooking oil aisle at your favourite supermarket and selected independent food stores.
ingredients: Sesame oil

title: Soy Sauce Dark
description: Classic soy sauce naturally brewed to have authentic aroma and taste. It can be used in cooking and as a table sauce.
summary: An authentic, naturally brewed dark soy.
ingredients: Water, soya bean extract, wheat flour, salt, caramel colour (150)

title: Soy Sauce Light
description:
Soy Sauce Light is naturally brewed to have authentic aroma and taste. Its light colour allows cooking with the taste of soy sauce without the dark colour.

It is especially suitable used as dipping sauce for seafood, sashimi and sushi.
summary: A lighter version of our classic dark soy, perfect for use in cooking or as a dipping sauce.
ingredients: Water, soy bean extract, wheat extract, salt

title: Spicy Sichuan Style Stir Fry Sauce
description: Chang's range of sauces makes cooking a delicious, quick dinner easy for everyone. This Spicy Sichuan style sauce is a great addition to stir-fries.
summary: Chang's range of sauces makes cooking a delicious, quick dinner easy for everyone. This Spicy Sichuan style sauce is a great addition to stir-fries.
ingredients: Water, Sugar, Garlic, Soya Beans, Salt, Chilli, Vegetable Oil, Rice Wine, Corn Starch (1422), Ginger, Spices.

title: Super Lo-Cal Wide Noodles
description:
Super Lo-Cal Wide Noodles are crafted from the soluble fibre found in the Konjac root. Low in calories and incredibly filling, Super Lo-Cal Wide Noodles are suitable for a low-carb diet.

A single serving contains fewer carbs than an average slice of bread.

Popular in Japan, Super Lo-Cal Wide Noodles noodles readily absorb the flavours of the sauce or soup.

Super Lo-Cal Wide Noodles are quick and easy to prepare—just rinse in water, add to your meal, and enjoy!
summary: Traditional Super Lo-Cal Wide Noodles are crafted from the soluble fibre found in the Konjac root. Low in calories and incredibly filling, Super Lo-Cal Wide Noodles are suitable for a low-carb diet.
ingredients: Water, konjac root extract, stabiliser (526)

title: Sweet Manchurian Stir Fry Sauce
description: Chang's Sweet Manchurian Stir Fry Sauce: Indulge in a delightful fusion of sweet and savory flavors for your stir-fry adventures. Try it now!
summary: Chang's Sweet Manchurian Stir Fry Sauce: Indulge in a delightful fusion of sweet and savory flavors for your stir-fry adventures. Try it now!
ingredients: Water, Sugar, Salt, Garlic, Tomato Paste, Vegetable Oil, Corn Starch (1422), Soya Beans, Peanut, Rice Wine, Chilli, Vinegar, Flavour Enhancer (621), Sesame Oil, Spices.

title: Tamari Black Bean Sauce
description: Black bean sauce is an essential ingredient in the Cantonese dish “Beef in Black bean sauce”.  It adds a unique flavour to stir-fry beef,  pork casserole and steamed fish.
summary: Black bean sauce is an essential ingredient in the Cantonese dish “Beef in Black bean sauce”.  It adds a unique flavour to stir-fry beef,  pork casserole and steamed fish.
ingredients: Water, Black Bean 16%, Spices, Salt, Sugar.

title: Tamari Hoisin Sauce
description:
A gluten-, wheat- and MSG-free hoisin sauce.

Perfect for marinating beef, pork or chicken or simply as a dipping sauce.
Great with duck dishes!
summary: Wheat- and gluten-free version of the Chinese favourite dipping sauce.
ingredients: Water, soya beans, thickener (modified corn starch), sugar, garlic, salt

title: Tamari Oyster Sauce
description:
Chang’s introduce Gluten, Wheat and MSG free Oyster and Hoisin Sauce. 

Use as marinade for stir fried beef, pork or chicken. 
Also great as dipping sauces.
summary: A gluten-, wheat- and MSG-free oyster sauce. A staple for your favourite stir-fry!
ingredients: Water, soya beans, thickener (modified corn starch), sugar, garlic, salt

title: Tasty Sichuan Style Stir Fry Sauce
description: Chang's range of sauces makes cooking a delicious, quick dinner easy for everyone. This Tasty Sichuan style sauce is a great addition to stir-fries.
summary: Chang's range of sauces makes cooking a delicious, quick dinner easy for everyone. This Tasty Sichuan style sauce is a great addition to stir-fries.
ingredients: Water, Sugar, Garlic, Soya Beans, Salt, Vegetable Oil, Rice Wine, Corn Starch (1422), Ginger, Spices.

title: Thai Style Rice Noodles
description:
A flat and wide rice noodle, popularised by use in Pad Thai recipes.  Just soak and add Thai Style Rice Noodles to your favourite recips.

No artificial flavours, colours or preservatives

Gluten Free.
summary: A flat and wide rice noodle, popularised by use in Pad Thai recipes; Just soak and add Thai Style Rice Noodles to your favourite recipes.
ingredients: Rice, Water.
allergen: Gluten Free, 99% Fat Free, No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

title: Traditional Super Lo-Cal Noodles
description:
Chang’s new Super Lo-Cal Wok-Ready Noodles are 100% fat-free, low-GI and gluten-free.

They are made from the soluble fibre of the konjac root which has been used in Asian cooking for many centuries. Ideal to add to a soup, stir-fry or even pasta.
summary: Chang’s new Super Lo-Cal Wok-Ready Noodles are 100% fat-free, low-GI and gluten-free.
ingredients: Water, konjac root extract, stabiliser (526)

title: Vermicelli Rice  Noodles
description: Rice noodles are a delicious and light alternative to wheat noodles or spaghetti.  Serve hot or cold with a stir-fry, soup or salad. Chang’s Rice Noodles are gluten-free and 99% fat free with no artificial colours or flavourings, packed with four individual portions.
summary: Versatile rice noodles for all your favourite Asian dishes.
ingredients: Rice, corn starch, water.

title: Wok-Ready Noodles
description: Chang’s Wok-Ready noodles are 99% fat free and convenient for quick meals.  No soaking or boiling required, just add straight to a stir fry for instant perfect results every time.  Available in the Pasta aisle at your favourite Supermarket and selected independent Food Stores.
summary: Your favourite noodles without the fuss.
ingredients: Water, Rice, potato starch, lactic acid, β-amylase (processing aid)
